**CFE**
**ខេមបូឌាន ហ្វែរវីន អ៊ិនធើប្រាយ ខមភេនី លីមីធីត**
**CAMBODIAN FAIRWIND ENTERPRISES COMPANY LIMITED**
Room 08-04, 8th Floor, Exchange Square, Street 106, Sangkat Wat Phnom, Khan Daun Penh, Kingdom of Cambodia
+855 23 231 600 Email: cfe.cambodia@gmail.com

**Referred Agencies**
Fire Compliance Certificates are issued by the National Quality Inspection Centre for Fire Safety Systems (NICS) and General Commissariat of National Police (GCNP).

Certifications for equipment and materials for use in fire prevention and fire-fighting are issued by (and, where applicable) tested by the National Quality Inspection Centre for Fire Equipment (NICE).

Training and Certifications are carried out by the National Fire Academy of Cambodia (NFAC).

Comment on the ████ Fire Certification
